hero.title: Built to Move
hero.subtitle: Performance athletic wear engineered for athletes who never slow down.

faq.a1: Cairo & Giza: 1-2 working days. Alexandria & Delta: 2-3 days. Upper Egypt: 3-5 days.
faq.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a2: Credit/debit cards, mobile wallets and installments via Paymob, plus Cash on Delivery (COD).
faq.q3: Can I exchange or return an item?
faq.a3: Yes — free exchanges and returns within 14 days as long as the item is unworn with tags attached.
faq.q4: How do I know my size?
faq.a4: Every product page has a size chart. Our compression fit runs snug — size up if you prefer a relaxed fit.
faq.q5: How can I track my order?
faq.a5: Use the Track Order page with your order number and the phone or email you ordered with.

product.fabricCareBody: Machine wash cold with similar colors. Do not bleach. Tumble dry low. Do not iron graphics.
product.shippingReturnsBody: Free shipping on orders over 2,000 EGP. Easy 14-day exchanges and returns across Egypt.
product.noReviewsYet: No reviews yet. Be the first to review this product.
product.reviewThanks: Thanks! Your review has been submitted.
product.reviewFailed: Could not submit your review. Please try again.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.selectGovernorate: Select your governorate above to see delivery time and cost.
checkout.noShippingZones: Shipping is not available right now. Please try again later.
checkout.minOrderCoupon: Cart total is below the coupon minimum
checkout.confirmedBody: Thank you {name}! Your order has been placed. We sent a confirmation to {email}.
checkout.emptyCart: Your cart is empty — add some items first.
checkout.orderFailed: Something went wrong while placing your order. Please try again.
checkout.shippingUnavailable: Choose a valid governorate so we can calculate shipping.
checkout.paymentUrlMissing: Paymob did not return a checkout or iframe URL. Check the Paymob test configuration and try again.
checkout.loginRequiredAfterOrder: Your order was created, but you need to sign in before opening the payment page. Do not submit checkout again.
checkout.orderCreatedLoginBody: Your order was saved. Sign in to continue payment, or track the order with the order number below.

payment.checkingBody: Please wait while we confirm your payment with the bank. Don't close this page.
payment.paidBody: Thank you! Your order {orderNumber} is paid and being prepared.
payment.failedBody: The payment for order {orderNumber} didn't go through or was cancelled. You can try again.
payment.timeoutBody: Your payment is taking longer than expected. Check your order status on the track page in a moment.
payment.missingBody: We couldn't find a payment in progress. You can track any order from the track page.

track.title: Track Your Order
track.notFound: No order found. Check your order number and phone/email.
